markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, publishing cadence, and strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** Tavrn will accelerate content reviews to maintain a consistent publishing cadence, which is critical for sending positive signals to Google and improving rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Traffic Dip:** A recent organic traffic dip is likely a temporary side effect of Tavrn's strategic shift from Google Ads to Meta, not an SEO failure.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The strategy will diversify from a sole focus on "Retrieval" to also cover "Demands" and "Chronologies" to capture higher search volume and improve internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Case Studies:** The RJLP case study was removed due to the immaturity of the featured eDiscovery product. The broader case study initiative is paused for a few months.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

## Topics

### Organic Traffic Dip & Tavrn's Strategic Shift

  - [**Problem:** Organic traffic has dipped slightly in recent weeks, with one article ("Brock services lawsuit") losing significant traffic volume.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** This dip is a temporary side effect of Tavrn's strategic shift from Google Ads to Meta.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Tavrn is winding down Google Ads to focus resources on Meta, where early signals are promising.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Action:** Jakub will analyze Google Analytics (GA) alongside Google Search Console (GSC) to confirm if traffic is simply shifting channels.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [**Tavrn's Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Bring Google-related marketing in-house, which will not affect the GrowthX content partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [Accelerate content reviews to maintain publishing momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Publishing Cadence & Review Process

  - [**Goal:** Maintain a consistent publishing cadence to send positive signals to Google and improve rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**New Review Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Case-by-case auto-publish:** For non-sensitive content (e.g., case studies), articles will auto-publish on Friday if no feedback is received by then.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Mandatory review:** Content on sensitive topics (e.g., HIPAA, competitor comparisons) still requires explicit approval.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** Matthew will work to deliver articles earlier in the week (e.g., Friday before) to give Kellie more review time.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Content Strategy & Product Information

  - [**RJLP Case Study:** Removed at Tavrn's request.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Reason:** The featured eDiscovery product is one of Tavrn's least mature.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew will remove the case study section from the blog post, which can then be published.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Product Information:** The initiative to gather robust product stats is paused.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Reason:** Tavrn's product team is at capacity, and current ad copy lacks the integrity for public use.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX can use any available stats for hooks, but a full data analysis project is needed before a robust library can be built.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Content Diversification:** The strategy will shift from a sole focus on "Retrieval."](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**New Focus:** Incorporate "Demands" and "Chronologies" content.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
          - [Capture higher search volume (e.g., "chronologies" has more queries than "retrieval").](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
          - [Improve internal linking structure.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Logistics

  - [**Meeting Time:** The weekly sync will move to an earlier time to better accommodate Matthew's time zone.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kellie:**](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [Review all pending content from the last two weeks by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [Send new meeting invite for the earlier time.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [Remove the RJLP case study section from the blog post and resubmit for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Plan next week's content to include "Demands" and "Chronologies" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [Analyze GA data to investigate the organic traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/yrvJXFAzsKsWqStzzCMHxySo9PyyKCXx?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
